headline: AMETEK Buys Kern Microtechnik To Deepen Ultra High Precision Focus
summary: AMETEK (NYSE:AME) has acquired Kern Microtechnik, a company focused on ultra high precision machining centers and contract manufacturing. The deal adds micro milling and optical inspection solutions aimed at complex, high tolerance components. Through Kern, AMETEK broadens its ultra high precision manufacturing capabilities across demanding industrial and technology end markets. For you as an investor, the key point is that Kern plugs directly into AMETEK's existing portfolio of high...
